default.$description: Default border — most common usage on inputs and cards.

strong.$description: Emphasized boundary — for active states or stronger separation.

focus.$description: Focus ring color for interactive elements.

success.$description: Status border for success-state inputs and cards.

danger.$description: Status border for error-state inputs and cards.

warning.$description: Status border for warning-state inputs and cards.

info.$description: Status border for informational-state inputs and cards.
